title: Atocion hypanicum
intro: Atocion hypanicum, also known as the Montenegro firewort, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Gentianaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its potential anti-inflammatory, expectorant, and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Atocion hypanicum include flavonoids, xanthones, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Atocion hypanicum is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to alleviate symptoms associated with coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
